mapper.delete: DELETE FROM name_match nm WHERE dataset_key=#{datasetKey} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM name n WHERE n.dataset_key=#{datasetKey} AND n.id = nm.name_id )
DELETE FROM name_match USING _tmp_nu tmp WHERE dataset_key=#{datasetKey} AND name_id = tmp.nid
DELETE FROM name_match WHERE dataset_key=#{key.datasetKey} AND sector_key=#{key.id}
mapper.update: UPDATE name_match SET index_id = #{nidx} WHERE dataset_key=#{key.datasetKey} AND name_id = #{key.id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM name_match WHERE dataset_key=#{key.datasetKey} AND name_id = #{key.id}
mapper.select: SELECT n.scientific_name || coalesce(' ' || n.authorship, '') AS label, count(*) AS count FROM name_match nm JOIN name n ON n.dataset_key = nm.dataset_key AND n.id = nm.name_id WHERE nm.index_id = #{indexId} GROUP BY label ORDER BY count DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE name_match SET sector_key = NULL WHERE dataset_key = #{key.datasetKey} AND sector_key = #{key.id}
